title: Anger Level
description: Compels the entity to track anger towards a set of nuisances.

anger_decrement_interval.title: Anger Decrement Interval
anger_decrement_interval.description:
Anger level will decay over time. Defines how often anger towards all nuisances will decrease by one.

Sample values:
• warden: 1

default_annoyingness.title: Default Annoyingness
default_annoyingness.description:
The default amount of annoyingness for any given nuisance. Specifies how much to raise anger level on each provocation.

Sample values:
• warden: 35

sound_interval.description: Anger boost applied to angry threshold when the entity gets angry.

duration.description: The amount of time in seconds that the entity will be angry.

duration_delta.description: Variance in seconds added to the duration [-delta, delta].

filters.title: Anger exemption filters
filters.description: Filter out mob types that it should not attack while angry (other Piglins)

broadcast_anger.description: If set, other entities of the same entity definition within the broadcastRange will also become angry

broadcast_anger_on_attack.description: If set, other entities of the same entity definition within the broadcastRange will also become angry whenever this mob attacks

broadcast_range.description: Distance in blocks within which other entities of the same entity type will become angry

broadcast_targets.description: A list of entity families to broadcast anger to

broadcast_filters.description: Conditions that make this entry in the list valid

calm_event.description: Event to fire when this entity is calmed down

on_increase_sounds.title: On Increase Sounds
on_increase_sounds.description:
Sounds to play when the entity is getting provoked. Evaluated in order. First matching condition wins

Properties:
• condition (string)
• sound (string)

Sample values:
• warden: [{"condition":"query.anger_level(this) >= 40","...

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: A Molang expression describing under which conditions to play this sound, given that the entity was provoked

angry_boost.title: Angry Boost
angry_boost.description:
Anger boost applied to angry threshold when mob gets angry

Sample values:
• warden: 20

angry_threshold.title: Angry Threshold
angry_threshold.description:
Threshold that define when the mob is considered angry at a nuisance

Sample values:
• warden: 80

max_anger.title: Max Anger
max_anger.description:
The maximum anger level that can be reached. Applies to any nuisance

Sample values:
• warden: 150

nuisance_filter.title: Nuisance Filter
nuisance_filter.description:
Filter that is applied to determine if a mob can be a nuisance

Sample values:
• warden: {"all_of":[{"operator":"not","test":"is_family"...

remove_targets_below_angry_threshold.title: Remove Targets Below Angry Threshold
remove_targets_below_angry_threshold.description:
Defines if the mob should remove target if it falls below 'angry' threshold

Sample values:
• warden: true
